title: WASD Bonsai Pots
description: The Bonsai Pots datapack adds a single new block, the Bonsai Pot. Based on an old mod, they allow you to grow various crops and trees in a single block. It automatically will harvest, and can be automated easily using a hopper.
body:
Bonsai Pots

The Bonsai Pots datapack adds a single new block, the Bonsai Pot. Based on an old mod, they allow you to grow various crops and trees in a single block. It automatically will harvest, and can be automated easily using a hopper.

After you place the block into the world, you just need to give it a valid soil type to begin planting! - **Dirt:** All the saplings and Bamboo - **Clay:** Dripleafs - **Moss:** All Flower Types - **Mud:** Mangrove, Blue Orchid, and Oak - **Mycelium:** Mushrooms - **Podzol:** Spruce, but grown at a faster rate - **Sand:** Cactus and Sugar Cane - **Soul Sand:** Fungus and Nether Warts

Learn more from this video:



NOTES TO YOUTUBERS: You may use this datapack in whatever video you like, free of charge. My only request: YOU MUST CREDIT ME for my work. Simply link to this page in your video’s description, pinned comment, or both AND verbally mention during the intro of your video that the pack can be downloaded using the link. “Download in the description” would suffice. To install, follow the instructions contained in the “instructions.txt” file included in the download. If you are still having issues installing or want help knowing how to do something with the pack, ask for help on our discord. Fully Multiplayer compatible!

Crafting Recipes Can be found In-Game. Press “L”)
